title: ElastiCache (Redis) Patterns
description: Implement ElastiCache (Redis) caching patterns, differentiating between write-through and lazy-loading strategies. Architect and manage cache-eviction policies, such as LRU, to reduce pressure on primary databases.
objectives: Implement ElastiCache (Redis) caching patterns, differentiating between write-through and lazy-loading strategies.
Architect and manage cache-eviction policies, such as LRU, to reduce pressure on primary databases.
